mapper.sql: r.id AS r_id, r.name AS r_name, r.description AS r_description, r.role_key AS r_role_key, r.create_by AS r_create_by, r.create_time AS r_create_time, r.update_by AS r_update_by, r.update_time AS r_update_time, r.is_delete AS r_is_delete, p.id AS p_id, p.name AS p_name, p.description AS p_description, p.permission_key AS p_permission_key, p.create_by AS p_create_by, p.create_time AS p_create_time, p.update_by AS p_update_by, p.update_time AS p_update_time, p.is_delete AS p_is_delete
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_role r LEFT JOIN tb_role_permission rp ON rp.role_id = r.id AND rp.is_delete = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_permission p ON p.id = rp.permission_id AND p.is_delete = 0 WHERE r.is_delete = 0 AND r.id = #{roleId}

SELECT
FROM tb_role r LEFT JOIN tb_role_permission rp ON rp.role_id = r.id AND rp.is_delete = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_permission p ON p.id = rp.permission_id AND p.is_delete = 0 WHERE r.is_delete = 0 AND r.role_key = #{roleKey}

SELECT
FROM tb_role r LEFT JOIN tb_role_permission rp ON rp.role_id = r.id AND rp.is_delete = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_permission p ON p.id = rp.permission_id AND p.is_delete = 0 WHERE r.is_delete = 0 ORDER BY r.create_time ASC

SELECT
FROM tb_role r LEFT JOIN tb_role_permission rp ON rp.role_id = r.id AND rp.is_delete = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_permission p ON p.id = rp.permission_id AND p.is_delete = 0 WHERE r.is_delete = 0 AND r.name = #{name} ORDER BY r.create_time ASC

SELECT
FROM tb_role r LEFT JOIN tb_role_permission rp ON rp.role_id = r.id AND rp.is_delete = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_permission p ON p.id = rp.permission_id AND p.is_delete = 0 WHERE r.is_delete = 0
AND r.name IN
#{name}
AND 1 = 0
ORDER BY r.create_time ASC
